deal: Cards are out. Try not to embarrass yourself.
Let's dance. I've got all night.
The deck is loaded — with destiny.
Shuffle up and deal the pain.
player_hit: One more card — what could go wrong?
Keep coming. I love it when you try.
Another card? You're fun to watch.
Hit me? No, hit YOU. Here it comes.
player_stand: OK, you're done. My turn now.
Stand? Fine. I'll handle the rest.
You're done? Good. Let the Joker work.
player_bust: And that's why you don't hit on 18, genius.
Over 21. That's a no from me.
player_blackjack: Natural 21. Don't get used to it.
You got a Blackjack. Enjoy it — it won't last.
Blackjack. My one weakness. For now.
player_win: You win. Don't expect a medal.
A win. Cute. But wait for the comeback.
Take the W. I'll take the next one.
Victory tastes sweet, doesn't it? Won't last.
Win all you want. The Joker always collects.
player_loss: That's a loss. Write it down.
Lost it. Just like I planned.
draw: Push. Nobody wins. Like your love life.
Tie game. We're even... for now.
A push. Let's pretend that was exciting.
dealer_turn: Joker's turn. Let's make it hurt.
My time to shine. Watch closely.
Now the dealer plays. And cheats.
Step aside. The Joker has the floor.
hand_complete: Hand's done. Next one's yours. Probably.
Round complete. Ready for the next?
Hand finished. Score's in. Move along.
session_complete_win: You won the session. I'll allow it.
Session over. You came out ahead. Don't push your luck.
Five hands done and you're up. Impressive-ish.
You beat the Joker. This once.
Session complete. Winner. Don't let it go to your head.
session_complete_loss: Five hands and you lost them all. Beautiful.
You lost. I won. The natural order.
Five hands. Zero hope. That's Blackjack.
new_best: NEW BEST SCORE. I'm... proud? No. Annoyed.
A new personal best. Great. My reputation's at stake.
Best score ever. For you. At least.
New high score. The Joker is NOT amused.
You set a record. I'll let that slide once.
